name: Unheard
overview: A unique period conversational series that gives a glimpse of the freedom struggle from Hyderabadi's point of view, which most of us often pay the least attention to. The countdown to witness the variety of perspectives of freedom, violence, war and peace from the voices of Hyderabadis (their fictional representatives).

trailers.title: Hotstar Specials Unheard | Official Trailer | All Episodes Streaming September 17
